g.text: The same weather exposure can mean different things depending on when it occurs in a fire history.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 8.4px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #7b5bbd

g.text: Takeaway: climate effects depend on when exposure occurs and on the current developmental state.
